title: AuditReceipt
description: Protocol-owned unsigned audit receipt payload family for signed sidecar attestations over signed audit objects, including import/restore provenance evidence without segment-byte rewrites.

importedSegmentLink.description: One imported or restored historical segment linkage proving sealed-byte identity and binding local provenance to prior sealed evidence.

imported_segment_seal_digest.description: Digest of the imported signed AuditSegmentSeal envelope for this historical segment.

imported_segment_root.description: Ordered Merkle root recorded by the imported segment seal for this segment.

source_segment_file_hash.description: Exact hash of raw framed bytes from the source imported/backup segment file.

local_segment_file_hash.description: Exact hash of raw framed bytes as stored locally after import or restore.

byte_identity_verified.description: Fail-closed byte-identity assertion: local segment bytes are identical to imported sealed source bytes.

authorityContext.description: Optional operator or authority context for import/restore provenance admission.

authority_kind.description: Authority category responsible for admitting this import/restore evidence.

authority_id.description: Stable authority identifier for operational provenance review.

authorization_manifest_digest.description: Optional digest reference for policy/manifest evidence that authorized this import or restore.

note.description: Optional non-secret operator-facing authority context note.

importRestoreProvenancePayload.description: Typed import/restore provenance payload binding historical segment linkage and source-manifest evidence while preserving sealed byte identity.

provenance_action.description: Operation kind proven by this receipt payload.

segment_file_hash_scope.description: Pinned segment-byte hash scope used to prove source/local byte identity for imported or restored segments.

imported_segments.description: Historical sealed segments covered by this provenance evidence payload.

items.description: One imported or restored segment provenance linkage.

source_manifest_digests.description: Digest references for source backup/export manifests or inventories that enumerated imported segments.

items.description: One source backup or export manifest digest.

operator.description: Optional operator identity associated with this import/restore action where human operation context applies.

authority_context.description: Optional authority context for policy- or authority-mediated import/restore admission.

source_instance_id.description: Optional source instance identifier from which sealed segments were imported or restored.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for audit receipts.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this audit receipt.

subject_digest.description: Canonical digest for the signed-object envelope this receipt attests to.

audit_receipt_kind.description: Machine-consumed receipt classification from the audit_receipt_kind registry.

subject_family.description: Optional machine-consumed family label for the signed-object subject targeted by this receipt.

recorder.description: Principal identity for the component or actor that recorded this receipt.

recorded_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp recording when this receipt was produced.

receipt_payload_schema_id.description: Schema identifier for an optional typed receipt payload.

receipt_payload.description: Optional typed receipt payload whose shape is defined by receipt_payload_schema_id.
